chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.3211 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ---------------------------------------------- 23.02.2026 Mr. Altaf Hussain, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP --------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this criminal bail application on the ground that the parties have settled their dispute out the Court. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
